hypothesis_en: Madam President, Mrs Gebhardt, I am going to convey your request to the President of this House, and without further ado we will proceed to the agenda with Mr Oslander's report on the progress made by Turkey in 2003 on the path to accession.
reference_en: thank you very much of course I'll pass your comment on to the President of the Parliament and with no further ado I'd like us now to start going through our agenda and to start with we have Mr Oostlander Progress towards accession made by Turkey Mr Oostlander you have the floor as rapporteur
source_es: muchas gracias Señora Gebhardt voy a transmitir su demanda al Presidente de esta Cámara y sin más vamos a proceder a proseguir con el orden del día con el informe del Señor Oostlander sobre los progresos realizados por Turquía en dos mil tres en la vía de la adhesión por favor Señor Oostlander
